title: Creating a GitHub Repository Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub repo initialization.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is a 'Repository' used for?
options: To store and facilitate collaboration on a specific project's code files

questions.question: Which of these visibility statuses is available for your GitHub repository?
What is the first step in creating a new repository on GitHub?
options: Having a GitHub account and following the prompts on your account page
